product.name: The Income Generator Program
product.tagline: Start Earning Online Using Just Your Phone
product.description: A beginner-friendly, step-by-step affiliate marketing program designed for complete beginners. No experience. No laptop. No guesswork — just a clear system that works.
product.long_description: A step-by-step affiliate marketing program you can follow entirely from your smartphone. Every module is built around one goal: getting you from zero to your first commission as fast as possible. Learn how affiliate marketing really works, how to find products that already sell, how to get traffic without running ads, how to create simple content that converts, and how to turn conversations into consistent commissions.

instructor.name: [Your Full Name]
instructor.title: Affiliate Marketing Instructor
instructor.bio: Started affiliate marketing with nothing but a phone. Helped over 300 students go from zero to earning their first commissions online.

contents.description: Step-by-step lessons you watch and implement immediately
Know exactly what to do each day, no guessing
Ask questions, share wins, stay accountable
Content stays current as strategies evolve
[Your bonus name here — e.g. Caption Templates]

curriculum.title: How Affiliate Marketing Actually Works
curriculum.description: Understand the full picture — from picking a niche to getting paid — so you never feel lost or confused about the process.

curriculum.title: Finding Products That Already Sell
curriculum.description: The exact criteria to identify high-converting offers so you are not wasting time promoting products nobody wants to buy.

curriculum.title: Getting Traffic Without Running Ads
curriculum.description: A 3-platform organic strategy that brings buyers to you consistently — no ad budget required to get started.

curriculum.title: Simple Content That Converts
curriculum.description: How to create short posts, stories, and messages that move people from curious to ready-to-buy — without being pushy.

curriculum.title: Turning Conversations Into Commissions
curriculum.description: A simple DM and follow-up framework that turns everyday conversations into consistent, repeatable income.

curriculum.title: Scaling Once You Get Results
curriculum.description: What to do after your first commission to multiply your income without multiplying your workload.

ideal_for: Anyone who wants to build an extra income stream online from scratch
Students, workers, or side-hustlers with limited time but real commitment
Anyone willing to put in 30 to 60 minutes a day for at least 30 days
People who want to learn a skill they can use for life
not_for: People who expect to make money without putting in any work
Anyone not willing to spend 30 to 60 minutes daily
People who give up after one week if things are not instantly working
Anyone looking for a magic button and not a learnable skill

outcomes: Understand how affiliate marketing works end to end
Generate consistent traffic without paid ads
Create content that converts followers into buyers
Earn your first commission within 4 to 8 weeks of consistent effort
Build a scalable income stream from your phone
requirements: 30 to 60 minutes of free time daily
Willingness to learn and take consistent action
No prior marketing or tech experience needed

guarantee.note: Results depend on individual effort and consistency. Most beginners see their first commissions within 4 to 8 weeks of consistent application.

seo.meta_title: Income Generator Program — Learn Affiliate Marketing From Your Phone
seo.meta_description: A beginner-friendly, step-by-step affiliate marketing program. Learn exactly how to earn consistently online using just your smartphone — no experience needed.
seo.og_title: Income Generator Program — Affiliate Marketing From Your Phone
seo.og_description: A beginner-friendly step-by-step system to help you start affiliate marketing using just your smartphone. Real skills. Real results.

legal.disclaimer: This program teaches affiliate marketing skills that require consistent effort and time to produce results. Student earnings shown are real examples and not guarantees. Individual results depend on the effort invested, your niche, and market conditions. This program is not a get-rich-quick scheme.
legal.affiliate_disclaimer: Results vary based on individual effort, consistency, and market conditions.
